title: Hypnosis
writer: Giuseppe Mangione, Eugenio Martín, Gabriel Moreno Burgos
actors: Jean Sorel, Götz George, Heinz Drache
plot: A hypnotist is murdered in his dressing room; the only "witness" seems to be his ventriloquist puppet, and a boxer and part-time delivery boy is blamed for the murder. Soon another murder occurs. Was the killer human or was the du...
